summary: Iteration 2 focused grading for eval 5: 7/7 assertions passed. Output uses Status: Blocked, Draft admission: Admitted - Blocked, and includes Rejected - Rewrite record.

expectations.text: Output applies or references a draft admission gate before clean-context review.
